description_long: This is a Samsung-branded mobile phone with a classic rectangular form and rounded corners, featuring a metallic or plastic silver-gray frame and a white back cover. The front is dominated by a touchscreen display, which is currently on and shows a colorful wallpaper of a person in a cap, along with several app icons and widgets. The back of the phone has a single camera module with an LED flash, a speaker grille, and embossed branding. Physical buttons are present on the sides, likely for power and volume control, and a physical home button is located below the screen. The device appears slim and lightweight, with a smooth, glossy finish on both the front and back surfaces. The phone is compact, suitable for handheld use, and typical of mid-2010s smartphone design.
description: A slim, white Samsung mobile phone with a touchscreen display, single rear camera, and side buttons. The device features a glossy finish and classic smartphone design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the touchscreen display, home button, and visible app icons and wallpaper.
description_view_1: Left edge view highlighting the slim profile and a single elongated side button.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the white cover, single camera with flash, speaker grille, and embossed branding.
description_view_3: Right edge view showing the slim profile and another elongated side button.
attribute_brand_logo: Embossed 'SAMSUNG' text centered above the screen on the front and 'TOK TECH' embossed in the center of the back cover.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a wallpaper featuring a person in a cap, with app icons for Phone, Clock, Settings, Messages, Camera, and Gallery, as well as a visible status bar with time and notifications.
attribute_camera_placement: Single rear camera module with LED flash, both located near the top center of the back cover.
attribute_button_layout: One physical home button below the screen on the front, one elongated button on the left edge (likely volume), and one elongated button on the right edge (likely power).
